description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing towards the top and bottom. The barrel is constructed from vertical wooden staves, held tightly together by two prominent black metal hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The wood has a rich, medium-brown color with visible grain, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. On two sides, there is a bold black hazard symbol indicating explosive or dangerous contents, suggesting the barrel is used for storing hazardous materials. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood as the sides, with no visible openings or spouts. The overall design is robust, suitable for industrial or urban environments where secure containment is necessary.
description: A sturdy wooden barrel with black metal hoops and explosive hazard markings on its sides, designed for secure storage in industrial or urban settings.
description_view_0: A wooden barrel with black metal hoops and no visible markings on this side.
description_view_1: The barrel displays a prominent black explosive hazard symbol on its side, with wood grain and metal hoops visible.
description_view_2: This side of the barrel is unmarked, showing only the wood staves and black metal hoops.
description_view_3: Another side with a clear explosive hazard symbol, similar to view 1, with wood and metal details.
